title: SystemHUD
description: A client-side mod that displays the in-game version, current java specs and system date and time
body:
SystemHUD adds the following features:

* IRL Date and Time
* System Specs like Java Version, Vendor, Architecture OS and CPU
* Current Minecraft Version

The mod is built using Kotlin and Java 22. **It is required that you run Java 21** or newer. However, you could run older versions of Java, but you may find issues.

The default date and time formatting uses CAN/CSA-Z234.4-89 (R2007), or simply ISO-8601, which is the standard for Canada. **This is intended.** However, you can change this in the mod config.


This mod requires the latest version (as of 2024-05-17) for Kotlin Programming Language, Fabric API, Cloth Config be installed in your mods folder.
For versions 1.0.4 or older, you need ModMenu installed.
